summary: Comprehensive testing of SmartQuote RFP Orchestrator completed. Backend APIs working excellently (96.2% success rate) with full multi-agent pipeline functional. Frontend loads correctly with proper authentication and role-based access. Minor issues with session management and PDF generation.

integration_issues.issue: JWT tokens expire quickly causing frequent redirects to login page

passed_tests: All authentication endpoints (admin, owner, sales, client login)
Multi-agent pipeline execution (RFP Parser, Pricing Engine, Competitor Analysis, Governance)
Client portal APIs (quote view, client actions)
Utility endpoints (SKUs, samples, dashboard KPIs, audit trail)
Landing page loads with proper branding and CTAs
Login page with demo account buttons
SME Dashboard displays real data (3 RFPs, ₹33,88,399.5 pipeline value)
Client Portal shows user's RFPs with correct statuses
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix PDF generation endpoint (405 error) and improve JWT session management to prevent frequent logouts during navigation
